Narratif généré : EnsembleValeurs jdv-absent-or-unknown-devices-cisis

version : 8; Dernière mise à jour : 2026-03-11 15:27:51+0100

Profil: Shareable ValueSet

  • Include ce(s) code(s) tel qu'il(s) est (sont) défini(s) dans http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/CodeSystem/absent-unknown-uv-ips version ⏿1.1.0
    CodeAffichageDéfinition
    no-device-infoPas d'information sur les dispositifs médicauxThere is no information available regarding implanted or external devices for the subject.
    no-known-devicesPas de dispositif médical connuThere are no devices known to be implanted in or used by the subject that have to be reported in this record. This can mean either that there are none known, or that those known are not relevant for the purpose of this record.

concept.display: Pas d'information sur les dispositifs médicaux
